{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323145122A2D707AB8A3DCB651388"}"},"total":1443},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7284883756639748920","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"总算是让我找到了一本好书了！精彩有看点，人物有血有肉，剧情呢，也不荒诞而且也不是那种主角五星杀九星的那种，是合逻辑的很好看，很精彩，越看越想看，总想去知道真相是什么，出去身边的人也没有，就是那种永远都不会死啊什么的，什么实力就是什么实力，不会是那种跟在主角身边，哎呀，都越级杀都能越级杀，哎呀，都多强呀，那种怎么混都混不死的那种不是那种，有逻辑，有看头，还不荒诞，而且角色都有血有肉，非常不错，真的是泥潭里面开出的一朵莲花出淤泥而不染"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1696144699,"group_id":"7239629958631394363","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"爱写小故事，喜欢写故事","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N97hwPDP4WXW/WgktGqCSIs=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/66f57657c94a4611ba5eb90e845b1a5e~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776789538&x-signature=YZPDFmKLmws9GcaQ1L1VWAd1H%2Fg%3D","user_id":"95699107172","user_name":"金玉抱彩"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"95699107172","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7239629958631394363","book_info":{"abstract":"陈不古在末世的第三年，终于第一次用上他的神话类异能【复活】。
是的，他死了。
不过不知道哪里出了问题，他没有复活，而是重生到了一切开始之前。
再一次觉醒【复活】异能时，他被禁止“套娃”。
这一次觉醒的，是闻所未闻病毒类异能【破解】。
“一个小偷窃取了神明的权柄，悄悄打造成了病毒的火种。”
陈不古还没反应过来，一道银光闪过，“小偷”的帮凶也闯入了他的身体。
新的末世，一切故事，重新展开…","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o7b2de8f71d232810534afdcafed9447d~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"骰子载酒","author_id":"","book_id":"7239629958631394363","book_name":"我的异能破解万物","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#102048","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":379,"name":"求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=379&name=求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7239654576247439872","read_count":"19881","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1586150"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.4","serial_count":"667","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,重生,穿越,末世,求生,开局","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/1029b0c5d9f83688e7db60ca4f64be2b~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779432682&x-signature=zQOLTDNGk2yvLn5F0NoTr6Cr3Xc%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3743174769772062","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"2.2539894e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323145122A2D707AB8A3DCB651388"}"},"relate_info_lis
